title: Ingot UI - White Version
description: A resource pack inspired by the upcoming OreUI (White Variant)
body:
## 📝 Description Provides a **brighter**, **lighter** version of [**IngotUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ingotui) for those who prefer a whiter and brighter look. This alternative version is **completely independent** from the original version, so to use it you simply need to download and activate it in Minecraft, have fun! ## ⚙️ Technical specifications * Supported Minecraft version: **1.21.10 and below** * Dependencies: [**Optifine**](https://optifine.net/home) or [**Optigui**](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) * Resolution: **16x**
Terms of Use - Downloading this content implies full knowledge of the terms and conditions listed in the license and to be bound by them. - zeit709 is the only creator and owner of this project. - These terms only apply if you intend to use the Resource Pack in your content, intended to be shared publicly. - The terms listed on the official project pages, CurseForge, Modrinth and Planet Minecraft are substitutes for any license, which will also be included in the resource pack files. - Credit is requested and appreciated if you use resources from this resource pack (for example: your name and a link to an official page). - The creator has the final say about which terms apply to your use of this resource pack and its assets. - These terms can change. With this resource pack, **YOU MAY**: - modify the resource pack if it's for personal use only, you cannot share it publicly. - include this resource pack in your mod pack or server. - use this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live, blog posts. - use an edited version of this resource pack in forms of content only if the edited version is not publicly available. - remix, transform, and build upon its assets in your own resource pack if credit is given. - earn money using remixed, transformed, and built upon assets in your own resource pack. With this resource pack, **YOU MAY NOT**: - redistribute this pack. - port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition, Minecraft Dungeon, Minecraft Legends. - include unedited assets in your own resource pack, unless you have permission from the creator. - include assets from this resource pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission.
